attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EUXOOLE.LINE_ID 	LINE_ID,
EUXOOLE.SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE,
CAST (CASE WHEN EUXOOLE.SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE='CONFIRMED' THEN
	 EUXOOLE.SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE ELSE NULL END AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE,
CAST (CASE WHEN EUXOOLE.PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE='RELEASED' THEN
	 EUXOOLE.PICK_RELEASE_DATE ELSE NULL END AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) PICK_RELEASE_DATE,
EUXOOLE.PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,
EUXOOLE.CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,
CAST(EUXOOLE.CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,
EUXOOLE.ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_RESULT_CODE  AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE,
CAST (
	 EUXOOLE.ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_RESULT_DATE   AS TIMESTAMP(0) )  AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME,
CAST (CASE WHEN EUXOOLE.COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CODE='CLOSED' THEN
	 EUXOOLE.COMPLETE_LINE_DATE ELSE NULL END AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE,
SSOL.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
EUXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE36  ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD,
CASE 
WHEN EUXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19 = '-1' THEN CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER)
ELSE
SSOL_BNDLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
END  RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
COALESCE(EUXOOLE.COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CODE,'=')   COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CODE,
/*following columns added by OM LSS team*/
EUXOOLE.CCA_ATTRIBUTE27,
EUXOOLE.CCA_ATTRIBUTE28
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINE_EXT EUXOOLE
 INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( EUXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
LEFT OUTER JOIN
	$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_BNDLE
ON	( EUXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19=SSOL_BNDLE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_BNDLE.SS_CODE ='QTC' )
 QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EUXOOLE.LINE_ID
ORDER	BY EUXOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
WHERE NOT EXISTS(
SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.WI_ORDER_LINES_EXT WLE WHERE WLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)

SELECT
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EBXOOLE.LINE_ID 	LINE_ID,
EBXOOLE.SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE,
CAST (CASE WHEN EBXOOLE.SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE='CONFIRMED' THEN
	 EBXOOLE.SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE ELSE NULL END AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE,
CAST (CASE WHEN EBXOOLE.PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE='RELEASED' THEN
	 EBXOOLE.PICK_RELEASE_DATE ELSE NULL END AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) PICK_RELEASE_DATE,
EBXOOLE.PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,
EBXOOLE.CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,
CAST(EBXOOLE.CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,
EBXOOLE.ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_RESULT_CODE  AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE,
CAST (
	 EBXOOLE.ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_RESULT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )  AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME,
CAST (CASE WHEN EBXOOLE.COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CODE='CLOSED' THEN
	 EBXOOLE.COMPLETE_LINE_DATE ELSE NULL END AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE,
SSOL.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
EBXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE36     ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD,
CASE 
WHEN EBXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19 = '-1' THEN CAST (-8888 AS INTEGER)
ELSE
SSOL_BNDLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
END  RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
COALESCE(EBXOOLE.COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CODE,'=')  COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CODE,
/*following columns added by OM LSS team*/
EBXOOLE.CCA_ATTRIBUTE27,
EBXOOLE.CCA_ATTRIBUTE28
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINE_EXT EBXOOLE
 INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( EBXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
LEFT OUTER JOIN
	$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_BNDLE
ON	( EBXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19=SSOL_BNDLE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_BNDLE.SS_CODE ='BV' )
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EBXOOLE.LINE_ID
ORDER	BY EBXOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
WHERE NOT EXISTS(
SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.WI_ORDER_LINES_EXT WLE WHERE WLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)

SELECT
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,

SSOL.SS_CODE SS_CODE,

ELSE

/*following columns added by OM LSS team*/
SUXOOLE.CCA_ATTRIBUTE27,
SUXOOLE.CCA_ATTRIBUTE28
FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINE_EXT SUXOOLE
 INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
LEFT OUTER JOIN
	$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_BNDLE
ON	( SUXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19=SSOL_BNDLE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_BNDLE.SS_CODE ='QTC' )
 QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUXOOLE.LINE_ID
ORDER	BY SUXOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) = 1

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
LINE_ID,
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_RESULT_CODE,
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_RESULT_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE5,
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,
PICK_RELEASE_DATE,
PRODUCTION_DATE,
SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE,
STAGING_RESULT_CODE,
STAGING_DATE,
SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE,
PRODUCTION_RESULT_CODE,
PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,
COMPLETE_LINE_DATE,
COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CODE,
DISPATCH_DATE,
DISPATCH_RESULT_CODE,
HEADER_ID,
CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE,
RECEIVABLE_INTF_RESULT_CODE,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ,
QUEUE_ID,
PROCESS_SET_ID,
Q_CREATION_DATE,
Q_UPDATE_DATE,
ACTION_CODE,
CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI'	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ATTRIBUTE36,
ATTRIBUTE19,
/*following columns added by OM LSS team*/
CCA_ATTRIBUTE27,
CCA_ATTRIBUTE28
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINE_EXT SBXOOLE
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
		 WHERE SBXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SBXOOLE.LINE_ID ORDER BY SBXOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1
